title: AetherLuckyBlock
body:
# Summary
An Addon for [MyLuckyBlock](https://modrinth.com/mod/myluckyblock).

![img1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8MrIYNnX/images/8c1f93afe32ae4625521c3603d02efad41b28912.png)

# Worldgen
Added a new lucky block named "Aether Lucky Block", it will gen in overworld or aether.

![img2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8MrIYNnX/images/4bd1c16e4d7edfe020ca85a6241066d769e829df.png)

![img3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8MrIYNnX/images/83861e772097ab11961b4af58db51758d8614652.png)

![img4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8MrIYNnX/images/5f11ffa1d1c4b631a5565eade2cdd20694cd7a7b.png)

# New Events
Also,there's some new events.

![img5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8MrIYNnX/images/98a9f6be0caf0b02eb902a7e9539fb935314a50a.png)
